plugins.name: writing-plans-html
plugins.description: Turn a spec into a rigorous task-by-task implementation plan rendered as a self-contained, syntax-highlighted (atom-one-dark) HTML page served on a local URL.

plugins.name: spoken-plans
plugins.description: Write a rigorous task-by-task implementation plan, then read a short spoken summary of the key changes aloud via macOS text-to-speech. Uses the system default voice; supports named, Premium, and Personal voices.
